title: Fastest Inflation in 31 Years Puts More Heat on Washington
content: The Consumer Price Index rose 6.2 percent in October from a year earlier, its sharpest increase since 1990. That is bad news for President Biden and the Federal Reserve.
en_title: Fastest Inflation in 31 Years Puts More Heat on Washington
en_content: The Consumer Price Index rose 6.2 percent in October from a year earlier, its sharpest increase since 1990. That is bad news for President Biden and the Federal Reserve.

title: The Vaccine Mandate Kicks In at 100 Employees. What If You’re at 98?
content: For small businesses hovering just under the federal vaccination guidelines, navigating this period is tricky.
en_title: The Vaccine Mandate Kicks In at 100 Employees. What If You’re at 98?
en_content: For small businesses hovering just under the federal vaccination guidelines, navigating this period is tricky.

title: Ozy Media Faces Federal Investigations
content: The Justice Department and the S.E.C. have contacted companies that discussed investing in the Silicon Valley media business.

more_info.byline: By Ben Smith and Ben Protess

en_title: Ozy Media Faces Federal Investigations
en_content: The Justice Department and the S.E.C. have contacted companies that discussed investing in the Silicon Valley media business.

title: Rivian I.P.O. Is Embraced by Investors Looking for Another Tesla
content: The electric-vehicle maker, backed by Amazon and Ford, ended its first day of trading valued at $86 billion, though its deliveries so far total 156.

more_info.byline: By Peter Eavis and Neal E. Boudette
des_facet: Sports Utility Vehicles and Light Trucks

en_title: Rivian I.P.O. Is Embraced by Investors Looking for Another Tesla
en_content: The electric-vehicle maker, backed by Amazon and Ford, ended its first day of trading valued at $86 billion, though its deliveries so far total 156.

title: A Chastened Alibaba Tones Down Its Singles Day Retail Bonanza
content: The Chinese e-commerce giant is updating its blockbuster shopping holiday for a humbler, more dutiful era in the country’s internet industry.
en_title: A Chastened Alibaba Tones Down Its Singles Day Retail Bonanza
en_content: The Chinese e-commerce giant is updating its blockbuster shopping holiday for a humbler, more dutiful era in the country’s internet industry.

title: China Evergrande meets another interest payment deadline.
content: Evergrande had three bonds for which grace periods for interest payments were set to expire on Wednesday.
en_title: China Evergrande meets another interest payment deadline.
en_content: Evergrande had three bonds for which grace periods for interest payments were set to expire on Wednesday.

title: When a Logo Doesn’t Risk It All: Meta’s Brand Is Designed for Unknown Worlds
content: The emblem for Facebook’s new parent company is built for the metaverse, even if it disappoints in the real world.

title: G.E. Breaks Up With Its Storied Past
content: The company, once the epitome of corporate ambition, plans to split itself into three separate companies.

more_info.byline: By Steve Lohr and Michael J. de la Merced

en_title: G.E. Breaks Up With Its Storied Past
en_content: The company, once the epitome of corporate ambition, plans to split itself into three separate companies.

title: Moderna and U.S. at Odds Over Vaccine Patent Rights
content: Moderna’s patent application names several employees as the sole inventors of a crucial component of its coronavirus vaccine, excluding three government scientists.

more_info.byline: By Sheryl Gay Stolberg and Rebecca Robbins

en_title: Moderna and U.S. at Odds Over Vaccine Patent Rights
en_content: Moderna’s patent application names several employees as the sole inventors of a crucial component of its coronavirus vaccine, excluding three government scientists.

title: California Businessman Is Sentenced to 30 Years in $1 Billion Ponzi Scheme
content: Jeff Carpoff, 50, ran a Ponzi scheme with his wife that sold nonexistent solar generators to investors, prosecutors said.
en_title: California Businessman Is Sentenced to 30 Years in $1 Billion Ponzi Scheme
en_content: Jeff Carpoff, 50, ran a Ponzi scheme with his wife that sold nonexistent solar generators to investors, prosecutors said.

title: Elon Musk sells $1 billion in Tesla shares to cover taxes on stock options.
content: The sale was far short of the $20 billion worth he promised over the weekend that he would sell.
en_title: Elon Musk sells $1 billion in Tesla shares to cover taxes on stock options.
en_content: The sale was far short of the $20 billion worth he promised over the weekend that he would sell.

title: Key takeaways from Week 10 of the Elizabeth Holmes trial.
content: Two former lab directors testified about some of the inner workings of Theranos.
en_title: Key takeaways from Week 10 of the Elizabeth Holmes trial.
en_content: Two former lab directors testified about some of the inner workings of Theranos.

title: Cherry Lane Theater Is Back on the Market After Sale Falls Through
content: It seemed as if the Lucille Lortel Theater Foundation’s purchase of the theater was a done deal in July. But now the property is back on the market.
en_title: Cherry Lane Theater Is Back on the Market After Sale Falls Through
en_content: It seemed as if the Lucille Lortel Theater Foundation’s purchase of the theater was a done deal in July. But now the property is back on the market.

title: Disney+ subscriber growth slowed notably in latest quarter, putting pressure on the company.
content: Disney is beginning a new marketing blitz to promote its all-important streaming service.
en_title: Disney+ subscriber growth slowed notably in latest quarter, putting pressure on the company.
en_content: Disney is beginning a new marketing blitz to promote its all-important streaming service.

title: Boeing agrees to accept responsibility for crash of its 737 Max jet in Ethiopia.
content: The company will pay out successful compensation suits and allow victims’ families to file those suits in Illinois. Families agreed not to sue for punitive damages.

des_facet: Boeing 737 Max Groundings and Safety Concerns (2019)

en_title: Boeing agrees to accept responsibility for crash of its 737 Max jet in Ethiopia.
en_content: The company will pay out successful compensation suits and allow victims’ families to file those suits in Illinois. Families agreed not to sue for punitive damages.

title: Daniel Lee Is Leaving Bottega Veneta
content: In a surprise split, the designer responsible for the brand’s revival is out.

org_facet: Council of Fashion Designers of America

en_title: Daniel Lee Is Leaving Bottega Veneta
en_content: In a surprise split, the designer responsible for the brand’s revival is out.

title: U.S. sues Uber, saying it discriminated against people with disabilities.
content: The Justice Department says Uber did not adjust its wait time fees for people with disabilities, even when Uber knew someone needed additional time.
en_title: U.S. sues Uber, saying it discriminated against people with disabilities.
en_content: The Justice Department says Uber did not adjust its wait time fees for people with disabilities, even when Uber knew someone needed additional time.

title: Is Denim in an Identity Crisis?
content: Low slung, high waisted, skinny, cropped, baggy, flared — there’s no consensus on jeans these days. What does that say about the era we’re living through? And what can it tell us about ourselves?

more_info.byline: By Haley Nahman and OK McCausland

en_title: Is Denim in an Identity Crisis?
en_content: Low slung, high waisted, skinny, cropped, baggy, flared — there’s no consensus on jeans these days. What does that say about the era we’re living through? And what can it tell us about ourselves?

title: Antony Blinken says ‘we have fallen short’ on global vaccine distribution.

title: Google loses appeal of $2.8 billion fine in E.U. antitrust case.
content: European antitrust regulators said Google gave preferential treatment to its own price-comparison shopping service over rival services.
en_title: Google loses appeal of $2.8 billion fine in E.U. antitrust case.
en_content: European antitrust regulators said Google gave preferential treatment to its own price-comparison shopping service over rival services.

title: Rivian will start trading today after an I.P.O. valuing it at nearly $70 billion.
content: The company, backed by Amazon and Ford, has delivered only 156 trucks so far, but its market worth approaches that of Ford.

more_info.byline: By Peter Eavis and Neal E. Boudette

en_title: Rivian will start trading today after an I.P.O. valuing it at nearly $70 billion.
en_content: The company, backed by Amazon and Ford, has delivered only 156 trucks so far, but its market worth approaches that of Ford.

title: Judge denies Apple’s request to delay App Store changes.
content: Apple may have to rewrite its policies to allow app developers to point users to alternative payment methods as soon as December.
en_title: Judge denies Apple’s request to delay App Store changes.

title: Meta plans to remove thousands of sensitive ad-targeting categories.
content: Ad buyers will no longer be able to use topics such as health, race or sexual orientation to target people with unwanted ads on Facebook or other Meta apps.

en_title: Meta plans to remove thousands of sensitive ad-targeting categories.
en_content: Ad buyers will no longer be able to use topics such as health, race or sexual orientation to target people with unwanted ads on Facebook or other Meta apps.

content: The petitions were submitted as employees at three other stores prepared to vote in a unionization effort.
